title: Finding Outcome Event v1
description:
Canonical schema for a single line in an engagement's outcomes.jsonl
(append-only, gitignored). Per roadmap section 7.2 and ADR-0002, the outcome
event stream is the highest-authority source for platform state in the
finding status reducer (lib/finding_events.derive_finding_status).

The store lives at <engagement>/.lab/outcomes.jsonl (e.g.
<engagement>/.lab/outcomes.jsonl) and is written exclusively via
lib/finding_events.OutcomeStore.append, which uses fcntl.flock +
symlink rejection + idempotency on outcome_id and on
(report_id, state, occurred_at).

Field note (handoff section 5 contradiction): use the FLAT
`bounty_amount` + `bounty_currency` fields, NOT a nested `bounty` object.
The roadmap section 7.2 example showed `"bounty": null`; the API and
tests use `bounty_amount` + `bounty_currency`. This schema codifies the
flat form.

outcome_id.description:
UUIDv4 for this outcome event. Idempotency key: appending an event
with an outcome_id that already exists in the store is a no-op.

report_id.description:
HackerOne report ID this outcome pertains to. Digits only as a string
(e.g. '1234567'). MUST match a report_id recorded in some workspace's
record.json (loose linkage — the store does not enforce it, the
record-outcome command does).

state.description:
Platform state observed at occurred_at. The reducer takes the latest
non-null state as platform_state. Unknown states are rejected by the
schema (enum).

duplicate_of.description:
HackerOne report ID of the ORIGINAL report when state='duplicate'.
Required when state='duplicate' (enforced by the record-outcome command
and by the reducer's contract; the schema allows null for non-duplicate
states).

duplicate_original_state.description:
State of the original report at the time this was closed as a duplicate.
Useful for the reducer's reportability decision (e.g. duplicate of an
Informative => do_not_report). Must be one of the outcome state enum
values, or null when state != 'duplicate'.

occurred_at.description:
ISO 8601 UTC timestamp the platform state was observed.
Used for ordering events in the reducer (latest non-null state wins).

source.description:
How the outcome was observed. 'human_h1_import' = a human read the H1
UI and recorded it. 'auto_h1_api' = pulled from the H1 API (future).
'manual' = recorded directly for testing or recovery.

final_severity.description:
Final severity assessment by the platform, if any. null when the
platform did not assign a severity (e.g. duplicate closures).

bounty_amount.description:
Bounty amount awarded, if any. null when no bounty was awarded.
Use bounty_currency for the ISO 4217 currency code.

bounty_currency.description:
ISO 4217 currency code for bounty_amount. Defaults to 'USD' when
bounty_amount is non-null and bounty_currency is omitted. null when
no bounty was awarded.

notes.description:
Free-text notes. MUST NOT contain secrets, tokens, credentials, or
PII (the store does not enforce this; the recorder is responsible).
examples: Metadata leak previously assessed as Informative. Recorded via SI-013 first data migration.

examples.notes: Metadata leak previously assessed as Informative. Recorded via SI-013 first data migration.
